changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Adding retention_days column to user table for personal channel retention settings.
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE "user" ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS retention_days INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 90; ALTER TABLE "user" ADD CONSTRAINT chk_user_retention_days CHECK (retention_days >= 90 AND retention_days <= 1825);

changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Adding retention_days column to organization table for organization channel retention settings.
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE organization ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS retention_days INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 90; ALTER TABLE organization ADD CONSTRAINT chk_org_retention_days CHECK (retention_days >= 90 AND retention_days <= 1825);

changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Adding documentation for retention_days columns and constraints.
changeSet.sql: COMMENT ON COLUMN "user".retention_days IS 'Retention period in days for personal channels (min 90, max 1825, default 90)'; COMMENT ON COLUMN organization.retention_days IS 'Retention period in days for organization channels (min 90, max 1825, default 90)';
